scripts.lint: biome check src .vscode README.md package.json components.json next.config.ts tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts
scripts.lint:fix: biome check src .vscode README.md package.json components.json next.config.ts tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts --write
scripts.format: biome format --write src .vscode README.md package.json components.json next.config.ts tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts
scripts.format:check: biome format src .vscode README.md package.json components.json next.config.ts tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts
scripts.check: biome check src .vscode README.md package.json components.json next.config.ts tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts && tsc --noEmit
